examples: How many of you know what iambic pentameter is?
And if you repeat them five times, you have pentameter.
A couplet written in iambic pentameter is called a heroic couplet.
Operation Pentameter also involves the Home Office and the Serious Organised Crime Agency.
Mr. STEVEN PAGE (Barenaked Ladies): And I thought, how am I going to fit iambic pentameter into a rock 'n' roll format?
